title: NoBorder
description: NoBorder is a Fabric-based Minecraft mod that aims to remove the hard constraints imposed by the vanilla world border and some coordinate limits, allowing players, entities, and teleportation logic to continue functioning at extremely far coordinates.
body: NoBorder is a Fabric-based Minecraft mod that aims to remove the hard constraints imposed by the vanilla world border and some coordinate limits, allowing players, entities, and teleportation logic to continue functioning at extremely far coordinates.
